free_text: Role of cluster structure in the breakup of 7Li
Homi Bhabha National Institute, Mumbai
14-UD Pelletron-Linac facility.
Self-supporting enriched (>99%) 112Sn foil of
thickness ~540 ug/cm2.
The corrected beam energy with the loss in half target
thickness is ~29.8 MeV (Ec.m./Vb ~ 1.37).
Five strip telescopes (S1-S5) with
large angular range of ~93 degree, was used to detect
two breakup fragments in coincidence.
Each telescope consists of two Si strip detectors,
with thicknesses of ~60 um as delta E and ~1500 um
as E respectively.
Each detector has 16 vertical and 16 horizontal strips
covering an active area of 50 mm x 50 mm.
Two Si-surface barrier detectors kept at
+/- 20 degree were used to monitor the incident flux
Five telescopes (T1-T5) of silicon
surface barrier detectors with delta E ~50 um and E
~1000-2000 um thick to measure elastic scattering
angular distribution.
No information on source of uncertainty
Imranpasha & Rudraswamy B
